create-table-with-rows-in-pdf.title: Create a Table with Header and Rows in a PDF
create-table-with-rows-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically create a PDF, add a Table, populate header and data rows, apply basic styling, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

insert-table-into-pdf-page.title: Insert Table into Existing PDF Page
insert-table-into-pdf-page.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create and style a Table, position it on a specific page, add rows and cells, and save the updated document.

auto-fit-table-columns-to-content.title: AutoFit Table Columns to Content in PDF
auto-fit-table-columns-to-content.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a table whose column widths automatically adjust to the cell contents using ColumnAdjustment.AutoFitToContent, and saves the document with platform‑specific handling for GDI+.

create-table-stretched-to-page-width.title: Create Table Stretched to Page Width in PDF
create-table-stretched-to-page-width.description: Shows how to generate a PDF with a table whose columns are sized proportionally to fill the entire page width using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-svg-into-table-cell.title: Insert SVG Image into a Table Cell
insert-svg-into-table-cell.description: Demonstrates how to embed an SVG file as an Image inside a Table cell of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, including PDF creation/loading and cross‑platform save handling.

embed-html-fragment-in-table-cell.title: Embed HTML Fragment in PDF Table Cell
embed-html-fragment-in-table-cell.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a table and inserting HTML markup into a cell using Aspose.Pdf's HtmlFragment, including platform‑specific handling for saving the document.

insert-page-break-after-table-row.title: Insert Page Break After a Table Row in PDF
insert-page-break-after-table-row.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate a table, and set the IsInNewPage flag on a specific row to force a page break after that row.

render-table-on-new-page.title: Render Table on a New PDF Page
render-table-on-new-page.description: Shows how to create a PDF document, add a blank page, build a table with header and data rows, and place the table on the page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-table-with-colspan.title: Create Table with Merged Cell Using ColSpan
create-table-with-colspan.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF table with three columns and merge a cell across all columns using the ColSpan property, including basic cell styling and platform‑aware document saving.

merge-table-cells-vertically-rowspan.title: Merge Table Cells Vertically Using RowSpan
merge-table-cells-vertically-rowspan.description: Demonstrates how to set the RowSpan property of a table cell to merge it with the cell directly below, creating a vertically spanning cell in a PDF table.

set-custom-cell-margins-in-pdf-table.title: Set Custom Cell Margins in a PDF Table
set-custom-cell-margins-in-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to configure individual cell margins in an Aspose.Pdf table using a MarginInfo object and save the document, handling platform‑specific GDI+ requirements.

set-default-cell-padding-for-pdf-table.title: Set Default Cell Padding for a PDF Table
set-default-cell-padding-for-pdf-table.description: Creates a PDF document, adds a 3‑column by 4‑row table, and applies uniform cell padding by setting Table.DefaultCellPadding with a MarginInfo instance.

read-rendered-table-width.title: Read Rendered Table Width After Layout
read-rendered-table-width.description: Creates a PDF with a table using Aspose.Pdf, lets the layout engine calculate column widths, and retrieves the rendered table width via the Table.ColumnWidths property.

import-datatable-into-pdf-table.title: Import DataTable into PDF Table
import-datatable-into-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to import an in‑memory DataTable into an Aspose.Pdf Table using Table.ImportDataTable and save the result as a PDF document.

import-filtered-dataview-into-pdf-table.title: Import Filtered DataView into PDF Table
import-filtered-dataview-into-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates creating a filtered DataView, importing it into an Aspose.Pdf Table with ImportDataView, and saving the PDF while handling platform‑specific GDI+ availability.

create-pdf-table-from-datatable.title: Create PDF Table from a DataTable
create-pdf-table-from-datatable.description: Demonstrates how to fill a DataTable, import it into an Aspose.Pdf Table, add the table to a PDF page, and save the document while handling platform‑specific GDI+ availability.

check-table-isbroken-property.title: Check and Set Table Break Using IsBroken Property
check-table-isbroken-property.description: The example creates a PDF, adds a table, reads the Table.IsBroken property to see if the table will break across pages, changes the property, and saves the document.

repeat-header-column-row-in-pdf-table.title: Repeat Header Column and Row in PDF Table
repeat-header-column-row-in-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF table with a header column and header row that repeat on each new page using Aspose.Pdf, including handling of missing input files and platform‑specific saving.

extract-tables-from-pdf.title: Extract Tables from PDF Using TableAbsorber
extract-tables-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate tables with TableAbsorber, iterate through rows and cells, and read cell text using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-table-in-pdf.title: Replace an Existing Table in a PDF with a New Table
replace-table-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate a table on a PDF page using TableAbsorber, remove it, and insert a newly created Table at the same position.

remove-first-table-from-pdf.title: Remove First Table from PDF Using TableAbsorber
remove-first-table-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate tables on a PDF page with TableAbsorber, remove a specific table using the Remove method, and save the modified document.

remove-all-tables-from-pdf.title: Remove All Tables from a PDF Document
remove-all-tables-from-pdf.description: Shows how to locate tables in a PDF using TableAbsorber and delete each absorbed table, then save the updated document.

batch-add-table-with-logo-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Table with Logo to PDFs
batch-add-table-with-logo-to-pdfs.description: Demonstrates iterating over a folder of PDF files, creating a table that contains a company logo image and text, inserting the table at the top of each document's first page, and saving the modified files to an output directory.

batch-replace-tables-in-pdfs.title: Batch Replace Tables in Multiple PDFs
batch-replace-tables-in-pdfs.description: Shows how to process all PDF files in a folder, locate tables on each page with TableAbsorber, and replace each found table with a newly created table.

apply-different-autofit-behaviors-to-mul.title: Apply Different AutoFit Behaviors to Multiple Tables in a PDF
apply-different-autofit-behaviors-to-mul.description: Demonstrates how to add two tables to a PDF and set distinct ColumnAdjustment values (AutoFitToContent and AutoFitToWindow) so each table sizes its columns differently.

set-cell-background-color-in-pdf-table.title: Set Cell Background Color in PDF Table
set-cell-background-color-in-pdf-table.description: Creates a PDF document with a table and demonstrates how to set the background color of a specific cell using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-solid-border-to-pdf-table.title: Apply Solid Border to PDF Table
apply-solid-border-to-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to set a solid black border on an entire Aspose.Pdf Table by configuring a BorderInfo object and assigning it to Table.Border.

insert-image-into-table-cell.title: Insert Image into Table Cell in PDF
insert-image-into-table-cell.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a two‑column table, place text in the first cell and embed an external PNG image in the second cell using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-image-from-memory-stream-into-pdf.title: Insert Image from Memory Stream into PDF Table Cell
insert-image-from-memory-stream-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load an image into a memory stream and embed it in a table cell of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-styled-text-to-table-cell.title: Add Styled Text to a Table Cell in PDF
add-styled-text-to-table-cell.description: Shows how to place a TextFragment with a specific font and size into a table cell, using the cell's IsOverrideByFragment property to apply the fragment's TextState.

add-centered-paragraph-to-table-cell.title: Add Centered Paragraph to Table Cell in PDF
add-centered-paragraph-to-table-cell.description: Demonstrates opening an existing PDF, creating a table, adding a row and cell, and inserting a centered paragraph into the cell using Aspose.Pdf.

set-cell-vertical-alignment-middle.title: Center Cell Content Vertically in PDF Table
set-cell-vertical-alignment-middle.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, adding a table, and setting the vertical alignment of a cell's text to the middle using the Cell.VerticalAlignment property.

center-table-in-pdf.title: Center Table in PDF using Aspose.Pdf
center-table-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a table, set its HorizontalAlignment to Center, and add it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf. Includes platform‑aware saving to handle GDI+ availability.

offset-table-left-margin.title: Offset Table from Left Margin in PDF
offset-table-left-margin.description: Demonstrates how to shift a table away from the left edge of a PDF page by setting the Table.Margin.Left property using Aspose.Pdf.

enable-table-splitting-across-pdf-pages.title: Enable Table Splitting Across PDF Pages
enable-table-splitting-across-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to allow an Aspose.Pdf Table to break across multiple pages by setting Table.IsBroken to true, and saves the resulting PDF.

prevent-table-splitting.title: Prevent Table Splitting in PDF
prevent-table-splitting.description: Shows how to keep an Aspose.Pdf table on a single page by disabling automatic splitting with Table.IsBroken and Row.IsRowBroken.

calculate-remaining-page-space-add-table.title: Calculate Remaining Page Space and Add Table to PDF
calculate-remaining-page-space-add-table.description: Loads a PDF, computes the usable vertical space by subtracting existing content height from the page height, checks if a table fits, and positions the table either below the content or at the top margin.

create-fixed-width-table.title: Create Fixed-Width Table in PDF
create-fixed-width-table.description: Shows how to create a table with a total width of 500 points, add a row and cell, position it on a page, and save the PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-table-width-80-percent.title: Set Table Width to 80% of Page Width
set-table-width-80-percent.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, adding a table, and defining its width as 80% of the page using the ColumnWidths property.

map-datatable-columns-to-pdf-table.title: Map DataTable Columns to Specific PDF Table Columns
map-datatable-columns-to-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to map selected DataTable columns to arbitrary positions in an Aspose.Pdf Table using a column‑mapping dictionary and Table.ImportDataTable.

import-filtered-dataview-into-pdf-table_.title: Import Filtered DataView into PDF Table
import-filtered-dataview-into-pdf-table_.description: Shows how to filter rows in a DataView and import the filtered data into an Aspose.Pdf Table, then save the result as a PDF document.

populate-pdf-table-from-linq.title: Populate PDF Table from LINQ Query using Aspose.Pdf
populate-pdf-table-from-linq.description: Demonstrates converting a LINQ query result into a DataTable and importing it into an Aspose.Pdf Table, then saving the table in a PDF document.

add-table-to-specific-pdf-page.title: Add Table to Specific PDF Page
add-table-to-specific-pdf-page.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create a simple 2×2 table, and insert it onto a specified page using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-table-after-paragraph.title: Insert Table After a Specific Paragraph in PDF
insert-table-after-paragraph.description: Demonstrates how to locate a paragraph containing given text in a PDF, create a table with header and data rows, and insert the table immediately after that paragraph.

insert-table-before-image.title: Insert Table Before Image in PDF
insert-table-before-image.description: Shows how to locate image objects on PDF pages and insert a formatted table right before each image using Aspose.Pdf.

create-repeating-table-header.title: Create Repeating Table Header in PDF
create-repeating-table-header.description: Shows how to add a table with a header row that repeats on each new page using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API.

style-table-header-row-pdf.title: Style Table Header Row in PDF with Aspose.Pdf
style-table-header-row-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF table and apply distinct styling to the header row by setting a background color and bold font for its cells using Aspose.Pdf.

add-repeating-footer-row-to-pdf-table.title: Add Repeating Footer Row to PDF Table
add-repeating-footer-row-to-pdf-table.description: Shows how to add a visual footer row to a PDF table, make it repeat on every page, and define the logical TFoot element in the tagged PDF structure using Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-table-alternating-row-colors.title: Create PDF Table with Alternating Row Colors
pdf-table-alternating-row-colors.description: Shows how to build a table in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, add header and data rows, and apply alternating background colors to each row based on its index parity.

add-hyperlink-to-table-cell.title: Add Hyperlink to Table Cell in PDF
add-hyperlink-to-table-cell.description: Demonstrates creating a LinkAnnotation with a GoToURIAction and inserting it into a table cell's paragraph to embed a clickable hyperlink in a PDF document.

add-radio-button-group-to-table-cell.title: Add Radio Button Group Inside Table Cell
add-radio-button-group-to-table-cell.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF table and placing a grouped set of radio buttons inside a cell using Aspose.Pdf form fields.

export-tagged-table-structure-to-json.title: Export Tagged Table Structure to JSON
export-tagged-table-structure-to-json.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its tagged content, extracts tables, rows, and cells with their properties, and writes the structure to a formatted JSON file.

export-pdf-table-to-csv.title: Export PDF Table Data to CSV
export-pdf-table-to-csv.description: Shows how to load a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and save its table contents as a CSV file using ExcelSaveOptions.

serialize-table-to-xml.title: Serialize Table to XML
serialize-table-to-xml.description: Shows how to create a PDF table with Aspose.Pdf, add it to a document, and then export the document's structure to an XML file using XmlSaveOptions.

render-table-from-xml-to-pdf.title: Render Table from XML to PDF
render-table-from-xml-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF document defined in XML (PDFXML) that contains a table, reconstructing it with Aspose.Pdf, and saving the result as a PDF file.

count-tables-in-pdf.title: Count Tables in PDF using TableAbsorber
count-tables-in-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, use TableAbsorber to extract tables, and obtain the number of tables via the TableList collection.

extract-table-coordinates-from-pdf.title: Extract Table Coordinates from PDF
extract-table-coordinates-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, iterating through its pages, using TableAbsorber to detect tables, and retrieving each table's Rectangle bounds (LLX, LLY, URX, URY).

extract-text-from-pdf-tables.title: Extract Text from PDF Tables Using TableAbsorber
extract-text-from-pdf-tables.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate tables with TableAbsorber, and read the concatenated text of each cell by iterating through tables, rows, and cells.

replace-keyword-in-pdf-table-cells.title: Replace Keyword in PDF Table Cells
replace-keyword-in-pdf-table-cells.description: Shows how to locate tables in a PDF, iterate through rows and cells, and replace a specific keyword inside cell text fragments using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-table-column-from-pdf.title: Remove a Column from a PDF Table
remove-table-column-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to delete a specific column from tables in a PDF by removing the corresponding Cell objects from each Row using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-column-into-pdf-table.title: Insert Column into PDF Table
insert-column-into-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a table, and inserting a new column at a specified index by adding a cell to each row, then adjusting column widths and saving the document.

reorder-pdf-table-columns.title: Reorder Columns of a PDF Table
reorder-pdf-table-columns.description: Demonstrates how to extract a table from a PDF, rearrange its columns by reordering Cell objects in each Row, and replace the original table with the new layout using Aspose.Pdf.

add-table-with-proportional-column-width.title: Add Table with Proportional Column Widths to PDF
add-table-with-proportional-column-width.description: Loads an existing PDF, calculates column width percentages, creates a table with those proportional widths, adds a row of cells, and saves the modified document.

set-minimum-column-width-for-pdf-table.title: Set Minimum Column Width for PDF Table
set-minimum-column-width-for-pdf-table.description: Shows how to create a table in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, enforce a minimum column width using DefaultColumnWidth, and add the table to a page before saving.

set-maximum-column-width-for-pdf-table.title: Set Maximum Column Width for PDF Table
set-maximum-column-width-for-pdf-table.description: Shows how to create a table in a PDF with fixed column widths (150 points) using Aspose.Pdf, preventing columns from expanding beyond the specified size.

import-datatable-auto-fit-columns.title: Import DataTable into PDF and Auto‑Fit Table Columns
import-datatable-auto-fit-columns.description: Loads a PDF template, creates an Aspose.Pdf.Table, imports a System.Data.DataTable, automatically adjusts column widths to the content, and saves the result.

add-auto-numbered-column-to-pdf-table.title: Add Auto‑Numbered Column to PDF Table
add-auto-numbered-column-to-pdf-table.description: Shows how to create a PDF document with a table using Aspose.Pdf, add rows, and automatically fill the first column with sequential numbers.

add-transparent-background-to-pdf-table.title: Add Transparent Background Color to PDF Table
add-transparent-background-to-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates setting a semi‑transparent background color for an Aspose.Pdf Table and saving the PDF, with platform‑specific handling for GDI+ availability.

set-table-zindex-in-pdf.title: Set Table Z-Index in PDF
set-table-zindex-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to assign a Z‑index to a Table in an Aspose.Pdf document to control its overlapping order with other page elements.

add-table-to-textbox-form-field.title: Add a Table Inside a TextBox Form Field
add-table-to-textbox-form-field.description: Demonstrates creating a TextBox form field, building a tagged table structure, attaching the table to the PDF's logical structure, and setting the field's appearance to display the table.

add-table-inside-paragraph-to-pdf.title: Insert Table Within a Paragraph in a PDF
add-table-inside-paragraph-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a text fragment and then insert a table as a paragraph into an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, with positioning and basic styling.

render-table-high-dpi-images.title: Render Table with High‑DPI Images
render-table-high-dpi-images.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a two‑column table, and inserting high‑resolution images using Image.IsApplyResolution and ImageScale to preserve DPI while mixing text cells.

create-pdf-table-from-datatable__v2.title: Create PDF Table with Dynamic Row Count from DataTable
create-pdf-table-from-datatable__v2.description: Demonstrates how to count source records, import a DataTable into an Aspose.Pdf Table, and save the resulting PDF, including platform‑specific handling for GDI+.

conditional-formatting-table-cells.title: Conditional Formatting of Table Cells in PDF
conditional-formatting-table-cells.description: Demonstrates how to apply background colors to PDF table cells based on numeric thresholds using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-table-90-degrees.title: Rotate a Table 90 Degrees Using a Transformation Matrix
rotate-table-90-degrees.description: Shows how to rotate an entire table by 90° in a PDF by saving the graphics state, applying a ConcatenateMatrix, adding the table, and then restoring the state.

detect-merged-cells-in-pdf-tables.title: Detect Merged Cells in PDF Tables Using TableAbsorber
detect-merged-cells-in-pdf-tables.description: Loads a PDF, extracts tables with TableAbsorber (FlowEngine enabled), and reports cells whose ColSpan > 1, indicating horizontally merged cells.

replace-merged-table-cells.title: Replace Merged Table Cells with Separate Cells in PDF
replace-merged-table-cells.description: Shows how to locate a table in a PDF, split cells that span multiple columns into individual cells, and replace the original merged table using Aspose.Pdf.

add-footnote-references-in-table-cells.title: Add Footnote References in Table Cells
add-footnote-references-in-table-cells.description: Shows how to insert a superscript footnote number inside a table cell and associate it with a footnote paragraph at the end of the PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-table-at-specific-position.title: Insert Table at Specific Position in PDF
insert-table-at-specific-position.description: Shows how to place a table at exact X and Y coordinates on a PDF page by configuring the table's MarginInfo and adding it to the page's paragraphs collection.

right-align-table-in-pdf.title: Right Align Table in PDF
right-align-table-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a table, setting its horizontal alignment to the right margin, adjusting the left offset, and adding it to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

create-table-with-2-point-border.title: Create Table with 2‑Point Border in PDF
create-table-with-2-point-border.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF, add a table, and set the table border thickness to 2 points using BorderInfo before rendering the document.

add-multiline-text-to-table-cell.title: Add Multiline Text to a Table Cell
add-multiline-text-to-table-cell.description: Shows how to create a PDF table cell containing multiline text by adding several TextFragment objects separated with line‑break fragments using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-pdf-tables-to-csv.title: Extract PDF Tables to CSV using TableAbsorber
extract-pdf-tables-to-csv.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to locate tables on each PDF page and export each table's rows and cells into separate CSV files.

extract-pdf-tables-to-datatable.title: Extract PDF Tables to DataTable Using TableAbsorber
extract-pdf-tables-to-datatable.description: Demonstrates how to locate tables in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber, convert each table into a System.Data.DataTable, and output the extracted cell text.

set-custom-row-height-in-pdf-table.title: Set Custom Row Height in PDF Table
set-custom-row-height-in-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to assign a fixed height to a specific table row in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf. The example creates a table, sets a custom height for the second row, and saves the document.

auto-fit-row-height-in-pdf-table.title: Auto-fit Row Height in PDF Table
auto-fit-row-height-in-pdf-table.description: Shows how to let a table row automatically adjust its height to fit the cell content by setting FixedRowHeight to 0 (auto‑fit) using Aspose.Pdf.

set-fixed-row-height-table-rows.title: Set Fixed Row Height for Table Rows in PDF
set-fixed-row-height-table-rows.description: Demonstrates how to assign a fixed height to each row of an Aspose.Pdf Table by setting the FixedRowHeight property before adding cells, and then saving the PDF document.

landscape-pdf-with-wide-table.title: Create Landscape PDF with Wide Table
landscape-pdf-with-wide-table.description: Shows how to set a page to landscape orientation and add a wide table that fits within the page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rotated-table-to-pdf-page.title: Add Rotated Table to PDF Page
add-rotated-table-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to rotate a PDF page and then insert a table that automatically aligns with the rotated orientation.

extract-modify-tables-rotated-pages.title: Extract and Modify Tables on Rotated PDF Pages
extract-modify-tables-rotated-pages.description: The example opens a PDF, checks each page for rotation, uses TableAbsorber to locate tables on rotated pages, and demonstrates modifying a cell's text before saving the document.

remove-tables-containing-keyword.title: Remove Tables Containing a Keyword from PDF
remove-tables-containing-keyword.description: Demonstrates how to locate tables in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber, scan each cell for a specific keyword, and delete the matching tables before saving the document.
